title: Automate gated Bureau runtime snapshot refresh
goal: Automatically refresh the immutable Bureau runtime and canonical read-only Registry snapshot after a verified main change, without touching the conventional dirty checkout, weakening deployment gates, or creating duplicate deployments.

acceptance.assertion: A versioned trigger considers only an exact merged origin/main commit with successful required CI and an explicit deployment intent; arbitrary branches, dirty sources, unverified heads and ambiguous GitHub state fail closed.

Refresh uses a clean detached or task-specific checkout at the exact expected origin/main commit and never pulls, resets, stashes, cleans or otherwise mutates the conventional Bureau main checkout or any foreign worktree.
Launcher, Bureau prefix and source checkout are lease-bound; identical in-flight or already-current refreshes are deduplicated, while a conflicting deployment or lease blocks before mutation.

The existing immutable installer runs with an exact-head precondition, preserves rollback evidence, and success requires post-install readback of manifest, package tree, snapshot inventory/tree, launcher digest and canonical bureau --json check.
A failed or unclear refresh remains visible with a durable receipt and does not retry, self-heal, or claim current runtime state until an operator-authorized reconciliation proves the outcome.

A read-only receipt reports origin/main, deployed source_commit, lag in commits and elapsed time; verified Registry changes become visible through the canonical snapshot within a documented bounded interval or produce an explicit alert.

Tests cover already-current dedupe, foreign lease, origin drift, dirty source, failed CI, installer failure, unclear outcome, rollback evidence, successful readback and preservation of a stale dirty conventional checkout.

metadata.source: GRIP-ROADMAP-V1-T014 closeout and live Bureau runtime reconciliation
metadata.observation: The canonical Bureau Registry already marked T014 verified at origin/main 7a07635de3e6, while the active immutable snapshot still pointed to 6f17c5a44143 and reported T014 planned. Manual atomic deployment restored consistency; existing drift and scheduler tasks explicitly exclude automatic repair.
metadata.safety_boundary: Automation may refresh only the immutable Bureau release and canonical read snapshot after all gates pass. It must not mutate Registry task truth, the conventional checkout, state-root data, systemd units or unrelated runtime paths.

implemented_contract.observation: GitHub main, exact merged PR, SUCCESS-only required CI, deployed manifest, lag and SLO are hash-bound without mutation.
implemented_contract.intent: Short-lived create-only intent binds exact target, deployment boundary, paths, authorization and required resources.
implemented_contract.leases: Apply reads the fixed private Grabowski resource database read-only and requires exact same-owner live leases with at least ten minutes remaining.
implemented_contract.execution: Exact target is cloned into an isolated detached workspace; target-based create-only ledger permits one effect attempt.
implemented_contract.readback: Success requires manifest, both launchers, package tree, Registry snapshot, bureau check and runtime identity.
implemented_contract.failure: Unclear post-effect outcomes are durable, preserve the workspace and never retry automatically.

validation.full_validate: 583 passed; Ruff, Systemkatalog boundary, Registry, StateStore and adapters valid
validation.synthetic_installer: Passed with temporary clean and bare Git repositories; both manifest-bound launchers executed successfully.

remaining_before_verification: bootstrap the exact PR #565 merge commit with the versioned immutable installer after the current foreign runtime lease terminates or is owner-released
deploy the merge commit of this staging evidence through the repaired installed runner under exact real Grabowski leases
record a successful runner result and publish the final verified Registry closeout
deploy the final closeout commit so the canonical snapshot exposes T016 as verified

bootstrap.reconciliation: The initial bootstrap command completed the installation; its wrapper misread the runtime-identity envelope. Independent readback proved the installed state valid without retrying the installer.

live_closeout.next_target: merge commit of the T016 parser-fix staging evidence PR created from b6744c156abda7b11534bb475223d902fb20a101
required_sequence: merge the parser-fix staging evidence after exact diff and CI gates
bootstrap PR #565 merge commit b6744c156abda7b11534bb475223d902fb20a101 with the versioned immutable installer
observe the staging merge commit as an exact verified main candidate
create one short-lived exact deployment intent and hold all five real Grabowski path leases
apply once with the repaired runner and require a successful full readback
publish, merge and deploy the final verified closeout evidence

parser_fix.validation: 22 focused refresh tests and 583 full tests passed; Ruff, Systemkatalog boundary, Registry, StateStore and adapters valid
parser_fix.live_failure_classification: The installed effect was valid; only the old process parsed the top-level runtime_identity envelope through result.status and therefore emitted readback-identity-invalid.

first_runner_attempt.reconciliation: Independent manifest, launcher, snapshot and runtime-identity readback proved the install effect successful. A second apply returned the same target result with reused=true and produced no additional installer effect.
